name: Outworld Destroyer
description: Their sanity I'll shatter; their dreams of conquest I'll destroy.

abilities.name: Arcane Orb
abilities.description: Adds pure damage to attacks based on the current mana pool.

abilities.name: Astral Imprisonment
abilities.description: Places a target unit into an astral prison. The hidden unit is invulnerable and disabled. When the astral prison implodes, it deals damage to the target and steals a percentage of their max mana. Grants the Harbinger flat bonus max mana based on the enemy hero's max mana loss value when the astral prison implodes.

abilities.name: Essence Flux
abilities.description: The Harbinger has a chance to restore a percentage of its max mana per ability cast. Applies a strong dispel if the damage instance brings the Harbinger below a certain health threshold. The Harbinger then constructs an Arcane Fortitude by consuming all of its current mana and granting itself an all damage barrier.

abilities.name: Sanity’s Eclipse
abilities.description: Deals damage to enemy units within the radius corresponding to the difference between the Harbinger's mana and all affected units' mana.
